stemHtml: The significance of V<sub>A</sub> for jet transport aeroplanes is reduced at high cruising altitudes because:

options.a: buffet onset limitations normally become limiting.
options.b: the engine has insufficient thrust to reach the limit load factor.
options.c: the elevator deflection is limited to prevent exceeding the limit load factor.
options.d: at high altitudes the bank angle is normally limited to 15° to prevent exceeding the limit load factor.
